settings.title: Past Session Recordings
settings.description: Missed a session? Don't worry! Browse our past recordings to catch up on previous discussions.

settings.question: How Do I Join The Live Sessions?
settings.answer: You can join the meeting directly from this page, or book your seat and we'll send the meeting link to your email.

settings.question: What If I Can't Attend The Live Session?
settings.answer: Don't worry if you can't make it! All our live sessions are recorded and posted in the "Past Recordings"

settings.question: How Can I Ask Questions During The Session?
settings.answer: During the live session, you can use the chat feature to ask questions in real-time. Jennifer will answer as questions are asked in the queue. You can also ask live questions in the chat.

settings.question: How Often Are Live Sessions Held?
settings.answer: Jennifer hosts live sessions weekly, typically every Wednesday at 5:30 PM EST. The sessions usually last about 1 hour 30 mins.

settings.question: What Topics Are Covered In The Live Sessions?
settings.answer: Topics are not pre-decided. Open house discussions are done. Jennifer might introduce new products in sessions. Mostly Jennifer answers questions from the participants.
